2487 N Willow Ave, Clovis, CA 93619, USA

Persimmon trees along fenceline on east side of Willow. Appears to belong to the house south of Darrell's Ministorage on Behymer, but apparently is not being harvested. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: October-November.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
